note: Token set is identical to Time Date Picker, Month Year Picker, and Number Picker. All four components share the same scroll depth visual language.

surface/neutral/default.description: Container background color in DS Core light theme. In the Customer App, the picker renders on --bg-surface-default (#1d1d23, dark theme).

text/primary.description: Color of the selected (centre) item in each column. In dark-theme app context, this token resolves to #f1f2f4.

text/placeholder.description: Color of all non-selected items in each column. In dark-theme app context, this resolves to #a3a3bc.

fontFamily.description: Font family for all column text.

fontWeight.description: Font weight for all column text. All items use Regular weight regardless of selection state.

selected.description: Font size for the selected (centre) item at position 4.

closeNeighbor.description: Font size for items one position above/below the selection (positions 3 and 5).

farNeighbor.description: Font size for items two positions above/below the selection (positions 2 and 6).

furthestNeighbor.description: Font size for items three positions above/below the selection (positions 1 and 7).
Opacity for items at positions 1 and 7.

farNeighbor.description: Opacity for items at positions 2 and 6.

visibleNeighbor.description: Opacity for items at positions 3, 4 (selected), and 5.

hidden.description: Opacity for unpopulated AM/PM column slots. The AM/PM column has only 2 populated slots; all others use opacity: 0.

columnGap.description: Horizontal gap between the three scroll columns.

itemGap.description: Vertical gap between items within a column.

selectionIndicatorHeight.description: Height of the selection highlight stripe.

columnGroupOffset.description: Horizontal right offset of the column group from the component centre (confirmed from Figma: left: calc(50% + 4px)). TODO: Confirm whether intentional.
